# DISCOVER Functional Templates

These are fillable Markdown previews, never official forms or approvals. Narrative fields must be specific, sourced and human-owned. Remove filler, generic praise, fake certainty, invented empathy, fabricated quotations, ghost authorship and untraceable claims.

## Canonical template field coverage registry

Each canonical JSON object is hash-bound. Every normalized Working-field ID appears exactly once in `field_bindings` or `nonpersistent_fields`; every binding resolves to a declared property in the linked closed schema. Render-only fields are discarded after preview and never smuggled into generic notes.
